---
name: Security issue (non-sensitive / low-severity)
about: Report low-severity or already publicly disclosed security issues, such as outdated dependencies. Do NOT use this for undisclosed vulnerabilities.
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

> ⚠️ **Before filing this issue:** this template is only for **non-sensitive** security matters — e.g. an outdated dependency with a known public CVE, a low-severity hardening suggestion, or an already publicly disclosed vulnerability that has a public advisory.
>
> If you are reporting a **new, undisclosed, or exploitable vulnerability**, please **do not** file a public issue. Instead follow the private reporting process in [`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md).

## Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the issue. -->

## Type of Issue

- [ ] Outdated / vulnerable dependency
- [ ] Publicly disclosed vulnerability (has a CVE / public advisory)
- [ ] Low-severity hardening suggestion (e.g. missing security header, weak default config)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Affected Component(s) / Version

<!-- e.g. package name + version, file/module, or commit hash -->

## Reference / Advisory Link

<!-- Link to the public CVE, GHSA advisory, or dependency changelog, if applicable -->

## Severity

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Not sure

## Steps to Reproduce (if applicable)

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Suggested Fix

<!-- e.g. bump dependency to version X, apply configuration Y -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other relevant information -->
